name: Jimi Hendrix
bio: Jimi Hendrix's catalog remains globally valuable through classic-rock replay, licensing, and perennial guitar-canon discovery.
notable_for: Jimi Hendrix remains closely associated with All Along the Watchtower and Purple Haze, which continue to anchor catalog attention.
career_highlight: Songs like All Along the Watchtower and Purple Haze still help define the catalog's long-tail earnings profile.
revenue_drivers: Classic catalog streaming keeps major songs active well beyond the original release cycle.
Playlist longevity and generational rediscovery support steady long-tail listening.
Film, television, sports, and trailer usage can reactivate demand for familiar recordings.
